about.title: About
about.p1: I'm Raphael, passionate about technology and building products that matter.
about.p2: I designed and coded this entire site myself — every line, every animation, every word. It's a playground and a proof of what I can do.
about.p3: I learn fast, dig deep, and turn ideas into things you can touch.
